items.title: Prominent Palestinian prisoner Marwan Barghouti assaulted three times in a month, family says
items.dek: The Israeli Prison Service says the allegation that Barghouti was subjected to physical violence by prison guards are "false and baseless".
items.body: The Israeli Prison Service says the allegation that Barghouti was subjected to physical violence by prison guards are "false and baseless".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Chinese national given one year in prison for smuggling ants out of Kenya
items.dek: Zhang Kequn was arrested in March while trying to travel to China with more than 2,000 live ants.
items.body: Zhang Kequn was arrested in March while trying to travel to China with more than 2,000 live ants.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israel and Hezbollah continue attacks after Israel-Lebanon talks in US
items.dek: Israel strikes hit southern Lebanon and Hezbollah fires rockets at Israel, a day after rare direct negotiations.
items.body: Israel strikes hit southern Lebanon and Hezbollah fires rockets at Israel, a day after rare direct negotiations.
items.author: IriLine Desk
